python -c 
import urllib.request

out = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1016_j.neuron.2016.02.013/files/poleg-polsky_2016_nmda-dsgc-multiplicative.pdf'

# Try the ScienceDirect article redirect to see if we can get the actual PDF link
# PII: S0896627316001069
urls_to_try = [
    'https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0896627316001069/pdfft?isDTMRedir=true&download=true',
    'https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/am/pii/S0896627316001069',  # accepted manuscript
    'https://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S0896627316001069',
]

headers = {
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36',
    'Accept': 'application/pdf,*/*',
}

for url in urls_to_try:
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) as r:
            data = r.read()
            ct = r.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
            print(f'URL: {url}')
            print(f'  Content-Type: {ct}')
            print(f'  Size: {len(data)}, Starts: {data[:8]}')
            if data[:4] == b'%PDF':
                with open(out, 'wb') as f:
                    f.write(data)
                print('  SUCCESS')
            else:
                print(f'  Not PDF: {data[:200]}')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'URL: {url} -> Error: {e}')
